approved_control.human_purpose: Make the cybernetic control chain use JSON as the only persistent control fact source.
approved_control.primary_object: cybernetic requirements, design, goal, plan, review, runtime, progress, and completion-verification chain
approved_control.requested_transformation: Replace official Markdown control artifacts with schema-validated JSON control files, JSON-only guards and compiler, a runtime JSON operation skill, append-only progress events, and verifier-gated completion.
non_goals: long-term Markdown and JSON dual-path compatibility
treating Markdown control files as official guard/compiler/runtime inputs
letting runtime Codex rewrite approved control JSON
approved_control.how_we_know_purpose_was_met: JSON schemas, JSON-only guard/compiler/predictor/orchestration scripts, using-control-json runtime protocol, progress verifier, regression inventory, and focused/full tests pass while Markdown official inputs fail.
approved_control.what_counts_as_done: Official control input is JSON-only; Markdown control input fails; runtime reads approved JSON as read-only; progress is JSONL; final goal_achieved true is allowed only when the verifier permits it; tests pass.

required_outcomes.statement: Official guard/compiler/runtime control facts are JSON-only.
Runtime completion claims are gated by progress evidence and verifier permission.

required_evidence.description: verify_runtime_progress permits goal_achieved true only with evidence
